onboarding.title: Own Your Dream Laptop
onboarding.subtitle: Browse premium PCs and pay in flexible monthly installments — zero interest, no hidden fees.

login.errorPhone: Enter a valid Tanzanian phone number.
login.errorPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.

signup.headingSub: Sign up to start owning your dream laptop.
signup.infoBox: We'll text you a 6-digit code to verify your number, then SMS you an initial password. You can change it anytime from Profile.
signup.errorFullName: Enter both your first and last name.
signup.errorEmail: Enter a valid email address (or leave blank).
signup.errorTerms: Please accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to continue.
signup.errorPhoneTaken: That phone number is already registered.

verifyOtp.title: Enter your code
verifyOtp.subtitle:
We sent a 6-digit code to
{{phone}}
verifyOtp.errorMissingPhone: Missing phone number. Go back and try again.

signInOtp.title: Sign in with code
signInOtp.subtitle: We'll text you a 6-digit code. No password needed.

forgot.title: Forgot password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter the phone number on your account. We'll text you a code so you can set a new password.

forgotConfirm.title: Set a new password
forgotConfirm.subtitle:
Enter the 6-digit code we sent to
{{phone}}
forgotConfirm.errorMissing: Missing phone number. Go back and try again.
forgotConfirm.errorPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.

kyc.title: One quick step
kyc.subtitle: We need your NIDA number and a clear photo of your ID before you can start a savings plan. Takes under a minute.
kyc.rejected: Your previous submission was rejected. Please re-submit with a clearer photo.
kyc.permissionDenied: Permission denied. Allow access in Settings.
kyc.errorName: Enter your legal first and last name.
kyc.errorDoc: Attach a photo or PDF of your ID.
kyc.successBody: We'll review your documents and notify you once you're approved (usually within 24 hours).
kyc.gateBodyPending: Your KYC submission is being reviewed (usually within 24 hours). We'll notify you once it's approved.
kyc.gateBodyRejected: Your last KYC submission was rejected. Submit a new one to continue.
kyc.gateBodyNone: We need to verify your identity before you can use this feature.

home.kycPendingBody: We'll notify you once you're approved (usually within 24h).
home.kycVerifyBody: Add your NIDA + ID photo to start a savings plan.
home.emptySubtitle: Start an installment plan for any PC in the Shop.

wallet.title: My Wallet
wallet.emptySubtitle: Your transaction history will appear here once you start using your wallet.

addFunds.title: Add Funds
addFunds.note: We'll send a payment prompt to your phone. Approve it to add funds.
addFunds.errorPhone: Enter a valid Tanzanian phone number for the mobile money payment.
addFunds.approveBody: We sent an on-screen message to {{phone}}. Enter your password to complete the top-up.
addFunds.successBody: {{amount}} has been added to your wallet.
addFunds.failGeneric: Payment was rejected or cancelled. Try again.
addFunds.failTimeout: We couldn't confirm the payment. If your phone was charged, refresh in a moment.

shop.title: Shop PCs
shop.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, brand, or specs…
shop.emptySubtitle: Try adjusting your search or filters.

product.successBody:
Reference {{reference}}

Make your first payment from the plan page.

installment.title: Plan Details
installment.cancelBody: Cancel this plan? Any allocated funds ({{amount}}) will be refunded to your wallet.

modal.title: Pay Installment
modal.errorInsufficient: Wallet has {{wallet}}; you need {{amount}}. Add funds first.
modal.errorPhone: Enter a valid phone number for the payment.
modal.errorKyc: Verify your identity (KYC) to pay from wallet.
modal.errorAddFunds: Not enough wallet balance. Add funds first.

installment.approveBody: We sent a payment prompt. Enter your PIN to complete the payment.
installment.completedBody:
{{amount}} added to your plan.
We'll prepare your delivery.
installment.failGeneric: Payment was rejected or cancelled. Try again.

orders.title: My Orders
orders.emptyActiveSubtitle: Start an installment plan from the Shop tab.
orders.emptyCompletedSubtitle: Completed installment plans will appear here.

profile.title: Profile
profile.exportComingSoonBody: We'll generate a download you can share. Tap again later.
profile.aboutBody: Ubepari Wallet — Save toward your dream PC. v1.0.0
profile.logoutBody: You'll need to sign in again to view your wallet and plans.

edit.title: Edit profile
edit.errorEmail: Enter a valid email or leave blank.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.warnBody:
Deleting your account will:

• Cancel any active plans and refund any wallet balance
• Erase your KYC documents from our servers
• Sign you out on every device
delete.subtitle: We texted a 6-digit code to your phone. Enter it to confirm deletion.

chat.title: Bepari
chat.subtitle: AI Tech Take · Online
chat.greeting:
Hi, I'm Bepari — your Ubepari AI Tech Take.

I can help you with:
1. Choosing the right PC for your needs
2. Understanding savings plans and the wallet
3. Tracking an existing plan
4. Anything else about Ubepari

What would you like to know?
chat.errorReach: I couldn't reach the assistant. Make sure you're signed in and online, then try again.
chat.errorStream: Sorry — I couldn't reach the assistant. Check your connection and try again.

errors.invalid_phone: Enter a valid Tanzanian phone number.
errors.too_many_requests: Too many attempts. Try again later.
errors.expired: That code expired. Request a new one.
errors.too_many_attempts: Too many wrong attempts. Request a new code.
errors.sms_failed: We could not send the SMS. Try again.
errors.consent_required: Please accept the terms to continue.
errors.locked: Account temporarily locked. Try again in 30 minutes.
errors.not_registered: No account found for that phone.
errors.weak_password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.kyc_required: Complete KYC to use this feature.
errors.kyc_not_approved: Verify your identity (KYC) to use this feature.
errors.missing_doc: Attach a photo or PDF of your ID.
errors.doc_type: Only JPEG, PNG or PDF files are allowed.
errors.too_many_active: You already have the maximum number of active plans.
errors.max_active_goals: You already have the maximum number of active plans.
errors.product_not_found: That product is no longer available.
errors.goal_inactive: This plan is no longer active.
errors.goal_not_active: This plan is no longer active.
errors.not_active: This plan is no longer active.
errors.invalid_amount: Enter an amount between TZS 1,000 and TZS 5,000,000.
errors.insufficient_available: Not enough wallet balance. Add funds first.
errors.pending_push: You have a payment in progress. Wait for it to settle.
errors.push_failed: Mobile money is unavailable right now. Try again.
errors.mno_unavailable: Mobile money is unavailable right now. Try again.
